'''âg-z-b''' ('''kagazab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vasoconstrict|vasoconstrict]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vasoconstrict|vasoconstrict]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kagazab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigazab|thigazab]] || [[word:jigazab|jigazab]] || [[word:shigazab|shigazab]] || [[word:kigazab|kigazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugazab|thuthugazab]] || [[word:jujugazab|jujugazab]] || [[word:shushugazab|shushugazab]] || [[word:kukugazab|kukugazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugazab|thugazab]] || [[word:jugazab|jugazab]] || [[word:shugazab|shugazab]] || [[word:kugazab|kugazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugazab|thugazab]] || [[word:jugazab|jugazab]] || [[word:shugazab|shugazab]] || [[word:kugazab|kugazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegazab|thegazab]] || [[word:jegazab|jegazab]] || [[word:shegazab|shegazab]] || [[word:kegazab|kegazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogazab|thothogazab]] || [[word:jojogazab|jojogazab]] || [[word:shoshogazab|shoshogazab]] || [[word:kokogazab|kokogazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogazab|thogazab]] || [[word:jogazab|jogazab]] || [[word:shogazab|shogazab]] || [[word:kogazab|kogazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogazab|thogazab]] || [[word:jogazab|jogazab]] || [[word:shogazab|shogazab]] || [[word:kogazab|kogazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgazab|thĂŠgazab]] || [[word:jĂŠgazab|jĂŠgazab]] || [[word:shĂŠgazab|shĂŠgazab]] || [[word:kĂŠgazab|kĂŠgazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagazab|thathagazab]] || [[word:jajagazab|jajagazab]] || [[word:shashagazab|shashagazab]] || [[word:kakagazab|kakagazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagazab|thagazab]] || [[word:jagazab|jagazab]] || [[word:shagazab|shagazab]] || [[word:kagazab|kagazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagazab|thagazab]] || [[word:jagazab|jagazab]] || [[word:shagazab|shagazab]] || [[word:kagazab|kagazab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagazab|shagazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagazab|goshagazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagazab|gokishagazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagazabnĂŒ|shagazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagazabnknĂŒ|goshagazabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazabnĂŒ|gokishagazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagazabshĂ«|shagazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagazabnkshĂ«|goshagazabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagazabshĂ«|gokishagazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazabro|shagazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazabnkro|goshagazabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazabro|gokishagazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazabmu|shagazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazabnkmu|goshagazabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazabmu|gokishagazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagazabsher|shagazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagazabnksher|goshagazabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagazabsher|gokishagazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagazabng|shagazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagazabnkng|goshagazabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagazabng|gokishagazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagazabya|shagazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagazabnkya|goshagazabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagazabya|gokishagazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagazabyam|shagazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagazabnkyam|goshagazabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagazabyam|gokishagazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazabnĂŒshĂ«|shagazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagazabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazabnĂŒro|shagazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazabnknĂŒro|goshagazabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazabnĂŒro|gokishagazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazabnĂŒmu|shagazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazabnknĂŒmu|goshagazabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazabnĂŒmu|gokishagazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazabshĂ«nĂŒ|shagazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazabshĂ«ro|shagazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazabnkshĂ«ro|goshagazabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazabshĂ«ro|gokishagazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazabshĂ«mu|shagazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazabnkshĂ«mu|goshagazabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazabshĂ«mu|gokishagazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazabronĂŒ|shagazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazabnkronĂŒ|goshagazabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazabronĂŒ|gokishagazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazabroshĂ«|shagazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazabnkroshĂ«|goshagazabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazabroshĂ«|gokishagazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazabromu|shagazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazabnkromu|goshagazabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazabromu|gokishagazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazabmunĂŒ|shagazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazabnkmunĂŒ|goshagazabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazabmunĂŒ|gokishagazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazabmushĂ«|shagazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazabnkmushĂ«|goshagazabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazabmushĂ«|gokishagazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazabmuro|shagazabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazabnkmuro|goshagazabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazabmuro|gokishagazabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
